codex_response:
Implemented the new task package at [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_20981f0e/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_20981f0e/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_20981f0e/generator.py#L81), and [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_20981f0e/notes.md). The rule is: red `2` cells define a lattice, each nonempty `1`-shape stays the same, and within its compartment it is translated so its bounding box is centered; nothing is rotated or repacked.

I used the Opus hint and discarded the Sonnet hint’s “generic compaction” reading; that correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_20981f0e/notes.md). No new primitive was needed. Validation passed on `4/4` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20981f0e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20981f0e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20981f0e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20981f0e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/20981f0e/previews/preview_03.png).
